scope.summary: Wire the Oracle FREE 23ai e2e CI lane to emit, verify, and upload K-format test-attestation artifacts or a typed SKIP status.
out_of_scope: Creating or enabling the repository signing secret
Claiming a hosted GitHub Actions run after this local commit

entry_points.name: oracle-free23 CI e2e lane
entry_points.trace: .github/workflows/ci.yml now tees the oracle_version_matrix free23 e2e run into target/test-attestation-evidence/e2e-oracle-version-matrix-free23.log, derives PASS/FAIL/SKIP from steps.free23-matrix.outcome, invokes ./.github/actions/test-attestation with lane=e2e-oracle-free23, verifies target/test-attestations with scripts/check_test_attestations.py, and uploads both the e2e log and target/test-attestations.

entry_points.name: disabled signer posture
entry_points.trace: When vars.ENABLE_TEST_ATTESTATION is not exactly true or the workflow is not a trusted push context, the existing action emits test-attestation-status/v1 with reason operator-not-enabled or untrusted-context instead of an unsigned .jsonl lookalike.

entry_points.name: attestation consumer selftest
entry_points.trace: `python3 scripts/check_test_attestations.py --selftest` exited 0 and accepted valid signed evidence plus typed SKIP while rejecting missing, tampered, unsigned, claimed-but-absent, and unknown-reason shapes.

entry_points.name: test-attest CLI regression
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-verifier --test test_attest_cli -- --nocapture` exited 0 with 3/3 passed: missing/malformed secrets refuse output, signed artifacts verify, and existing outputs are not overwritten.

entry_points.name: test-attestation format contract
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-verifier --test test_attestation -- --test-threads=1` exited 0 with 11/11 passed: golden format, digest binding, malformed frames, over-claiming, key identity, and MAC checks remain intact.

entry_points.name: workflow supply-chain lint
entry_points.trace: `bash scripts/workflow_supply_chain_check.sh` exited 0, accepting the modified CI workflow action policy.

limitations: This close proves local workflow wiring and verifier behavior. It does not claim a hosted oracle-free23 GitHub Actions run after ef3e6c8c.

The repository signing key remains operator-owned; if ENABLE_TEST_ATTESTATION is false or no ORACLEMCP_TEST_ATTESTATION_KEY secret is present, the e2e lane emits typed SKIP status rather than signed evidence.
